Provenance.drafts: LW-art parity, 2026-07-19: 10 candidates total via ComfyUI MCP against the same hardened recipe used for hero-occultist (NoConceptSheet negative + the painterly-illustration positive addendum from the start, seed 1731462135+0..+4, then two further escalation rounds seed+... rewording the weapon phrasing). 9 of 10 rejected: floating weapon-icon insets, a full character-sheet/color-swatch/thumbnail-grid layout, a duplicate small thumbnail figure, a two-headed anatomy error, an out-of-palette glowing archway background, and a torn-paper-edge artifact each recurred across escalations -- the 'shield + warhammer' combo proved a stronger concept-sheet/multi-view attractor for this checkpoint than the other two classes' single-weapon phrasing. Curated per art/pipeline/README.md.
Provenance.paintoverNote: Winner is round-1 c0 (seed+0, the base seed itself, no offset): single bulky plate-armored knight, full helm, one polearm-type weapon and a flowing cape, soft gradient background, no artifacts across 10 candidates -- the cleanest composition despite not literally rendering the shield+warhammer pair. Silhouette still reads distinct from Vanguard (different helm shape, cape, and weapon) and Skirmisher/Occultist (much bulkier plate), which was the actual design goal (HeroSpecs.cs's per-class divergence note).
Provenance.aiDisclosure: AI-generated (SDXL base 1.0) diffuse; background-removed via BiRefNet (cutout.py --trim); normal map derived via normalmap.py (Sobel height-from-luminance, strength 2.5), Flip-Y-OFF import convention unchanged from the hero-vanguard/striker/mystic precedent -- lit ClassFigure sprite per AssetSpec.NormalMap=true, NeutralBaseTint=true (multiplied in-engine by ClassDefinition.ColorRgb for 'sentinel', bronze (176,141,87)).
